notes: Created dynamic service detail page at app/services/[slug]/page.tsx. Implements generateStaticParams from site.services, notFound() for unknown slugs, and all required sections (Hero, What's Included, Why It Matters, Related Services, QuoteCTA). Uses shared components from contract paths, real content from lib/site.ts, and dark-toned Unsplash images with width/height set. Benefits and 'why it matters' content are defined per service slug.
